# Acronis

> Acronis is a global cyber protection company providing integrated backup, disaster recovery, cybersecurity, and endpoint management solutions for businesses, managed service providers (MSPs), and home users. Founded in 2003, headquartered in Schaffhausen, Switzerland. The flagship platform — Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud — serves 21,000+ MSPs worldwide, natively integrating backup, security, and endpoint management in a single solution.

All pages on this site are available as clean Markdown at the same URL with `.md` appended.
For example: `https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/` is available at `https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect.md`

A complete listing of all 8,185 pages across 20 locales is available at [llms-full.txt](https://www.acronis.com/llms-full.txt).

## Products — MSP / Service Provider

- [Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect.md): All-in-one integrated backup, cybersecurity, and endpoint management platform for MSPs
- [Cloud Platform Overview](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud.md): Overview of the Acronis service provider platform
- [Backup & Recovery](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/backup.md): Cloud backup features for MSP clients
- [Disaster Recovery](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/disaster-recovery.md): Cloud-based disaster recovery for MSPs
- [Email Security](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/email-security.md): Advanced email threat protection
- [EDR / XDR](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/extended-detection-and-response.md): Extended detection and response for MSPs
- [MDR](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/managed-detection-and-response.md): Managed detection and response service
- [Security EDR](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/security-edr.md): Endpoint detection and response add-on
- [RMM Solution](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/rmm-solution.md): Remote monitoring and management for MSPs
- [PSA Solution](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/psa-solution.md): Professional services automation for MSPs
- [Data Loss Prevention](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/data-loss-prevention.md): Endpoint DLP for service providers
- [Microsoft 365 Backup](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/m365-backup.md): Microsoft 365 backup and recovery
- [Security Awareness Training](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/security-awareness-training.md): End-user cybersecurity training
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/workflow-automation.md): Automation for MSP operations
- [Pricing](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cloud/cyber-protect/pricing.md): Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud pricing

## Products — Business

- [Acronis Cyber Protect](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-protect.md): On-premise cyber protection for businesses — backup, anti-malware, and endpoint management
- [Acronis Cyber Protect for Enterprise](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-protect/enterprise.md): Enterprise-scale cyber protection
- [Acronis Cyber Protect for Small Business](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-protect/small-business.md): Cyber protection for small businesses
- [Acronis Cyber Protect OT](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-protect-ot.md): Operational technology protection — backup and recovery for industrial systems
- [Acronis Cyber Infrastructure](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-infrastructure.md): Scale-out multi-purpose infrastructure for cyber protection
- [DeviceLock DLP](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/devicelock.md): Endpoint data loss prevention
- [Snap Deploy](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/snap-deploy.md): Mass system deployment and provisioning

## Products — Home

- [Acronis True Image](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/true-image.md): Personal backup, cloning, cyber protection, and privacy tools for home users
- [Acronis Cyber Protect Home & Business](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/cyber-protect-home-and-business.md): Backup and anti-malware for small offices and home users
- [Compare Products](https://www.acronis.com/en/products/compare-products.md): Side-by-side comparison of all Acronis products

## Technology

- [Active Protection](https://www.acronis.com/en/technology/active-protection.md): AI-based real-time ransomware and malware protection
- [Anti-Malware](https://www.acronis.com/en/technology/antimalware.md): Multi-layered anti-malware technology
- [Blockchain Notary](https://www.acronis.com/en/technology/blockchain-notary.md): Blockchain-based data authentication and notarization
- [Universal Restore](https://www.acronis.com/en/technology/universal-restore.md): System restoration to dissimilar hardware
